Mercer Super Trust is one of Australia's 15 largest superannuation funds [VERIFIED]. mobility_signal.rationale: Cathy Hales commenced her current role at Mercer on 24 July 2023 [VERIFIED], giving her tenure of only 2 years 8 months. role_fit.justification: Extreme seniority mismatch. Cathy Hales is a C-suite executive currently leading a A$79.85 billion superannuation fund and multi-manager business [VERIFIED], and previously grew Fidante Partners from A$15bn to A$60bn as Global Head [VERIFIED]. Her career has focused on CEO/COO-level P&L ownership, M&A, platform strategy, and board governance — not hands-on distribution team leadership. She has not held a direct sales or BDM position in over two decades and is multiple levels too senior for a Head of Distribution role. Additionally, her current focus is superannuation fund leadership, not active funds management distribution.

candidates.outreach_hook: Given Mercer's aggressive fund consolidation strategy — having absorbed BT Super, Advance Asset Management, and Lutheran Super in recent years [VERIFIED] — and Cathy's relatively recent appointment (July 2023) to lead the integration, this is not a candidate open to external distribution leadership roles.
